name: GoDaddy API
what_it_does: GoDaddy's REST API for domain registration, DNS management, domain availability checking, and domain portfolio management through the world's largest domain registrar.
use_cases: DNS record management for GoDaddy-hosted domains
Bulk domain availability checking for domain investment or brand protection
Automating domain renewal to prevent expiration
Domain transfer and reseller portfolio management
not_for: Advanced DNS features or CDN (use Cloudflare)
best_when: You manage domains through GoDaddy and need to automate domain registration, DNS updates, or portfolio management at scale.
avoid_when: You need advanced DNS features, CDN, or are migrating domains to a better provider.

auth.notes: API key and secret passed as Authorization header (sso-key format: key:secret). No OAuth or scoped tokens. Full account access with API credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free with GoDaddy account
pricing.paid_tiers: Domain registration costs; reseller pricing for OTE/production access
pricing.notes: API access is free. OTE (test environment) available. Production API requires purchasing domains at GoDaddy standard pricing. Reseller API requires reseller agreement.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON error responses with error codes and messages. Some error messages are generic. Documentation has gaps in error catalog coverage.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: DNS record PUT operations are idempotent (replaces all records of type). Domain availability checks are read-only.
known_agent_gotchas: DNS record API replaces all records of a type — must fetch existing records before adding to avoid overwriting
OTE (test environment) uses separate API keys from production — don't mix up
GoDaddy Shopper API (legacy) vs Reseller API have very different capabilities and auth
Domain lock status must be disabled before transfer — check programmatically before initiating transfers
TTL changes can take time to propagate regardless of API success response
API documentation references both 'v1' and older undocumented endpoints — stick to documented v1 endpoints

security_score_components.security_notes: Domain registrar/hosting API. API key + secret. Domain management is high-value — agents could transfer domains. Restrict to needed operations. Production environments risk.
